final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for the Changan Q06 vehicle launch announcement.

Style/medium: clean corporate presentation design, minimalist automotive marketing aesthetic, subtle gradient overlays
Composition: centered layout with generous top and bottom margins, title hierarchy with clear visual weight
Subject: "长安起源Q06" as primary headline with "将于9月上市" as supporting subheadline, modern sans-serif typography
Scene/backdrop: translucent atmospheric background suggesting motion and innovation, soft abstract light trails or cityscape silhouette with depth
Lighting/mood: soft diffused ambient light with subtle rim highlights, aspirational and forward-looking mood
Color palette: deep navy or charcoal as base, electric blue or silver as accent, high contrast white for text legibility
Text (verbatim): "长安起源Q06将于9月上市"
Constraints: must work as PowerPoint cover at 16:9 ratio; text must remain readable at thumbnail size; background must not overpower headline
Avoid: cluttered elements, stock photo clichés, overly decorative fonts, heavy drop shadows, busy patterns behind text
